TECHNICAL  EXPERIENCES  & RESPONSIBILITIES  
 
PRINICIPAL SOFTWARE  ENGINEER / SENIOR  SOFTWARE  ENGINEER  OCT 24 — Present 
Deltek India Remote, India 
• Datalake lexical search:  Designed and built the search mechanism for datalake , which can be used by products to search data with the help of an api. Using aws  lambda to build the services.

• Notification Service:  Designed and built a notification service, which can be used by products to send notifications via email. Developed spring bo ot api’s which can be used to access OCI 
resources and deployed the service i n OCI. Led this project.  
• Intelligent Document Reader Project: Designed and Built an intelligent AI system from scratch which takes a document, reads it and answers user’s question. Develo ped 3 services. One for

pushing the document metadata to OCI object s torage and pushing an event. Second one for polling Kafka event and passing it to the third service which interacts with a LL M model. Used OCI 
Stream to produce and consume events.  Led this project.  
• Chatbot  Project:  Built a chatbot with integration with Microsoft teams open ai. Developed two services from scratch. One is called Register service,  that is used for Bot registration which is

built in Spring Boot and other is called MCP server which works as a communicating lay er for the LLM Service.  The project follows an agentic AI architecture leveraging Generative AI.  
• Logging  & Metrics  Feature:  Led the integration of logging and metrics feature in the bot project. Developed logging layer which pushes the logs to Grafa na with the help of Winston library and 
metrics to Prometheus server which could then be viewed in a different Grafana dashboard.

metrics to Prometheus server which could then be viewed in a different Grafana dashboard.

• Mirabaud project: This was my ongoing project. Analyzed the Keycloak  system and built a similar feature. Built a trading constraint tool and used Azure Cloud to deploy and test all

fixes and developments.

functional teams to launch client FATCA simulator ahead of schedule.

by 30%. Wo rked on web application performance fixes and improved the time complexity of the client’s system. Also worked on post -live maintenance defects.  
• Served  twice  as an Onsite  technical  consultant  (Eurobank  Cyprus) —from  May to July 2022, and again  from  September  to October  2022.
